content:
Have you already allowed TB-A to run in the background and excluded it from android battery optimisation to rule them out as the possible cause? You should do this in any event to ensure timely notifications when the screen is off.

Some phone manufacturer's include a gaming mode app that allows users to control unwanted interruptions while playing supported games by disabling calls and some notifications. Samsung Game Booster and Oneplus Game Mode are two examples. Have at look at their settings if you have these or a similar app installed.
